summary: Well-organized unit test suite following TDD methodology with comprehensive coverage of core requirements (glob patterns, label assignment, multiple labels, priority ordering, error handling). Good use of fixtures including realistic PR scenario. However, lacks testing for glob edge cases (character classes `[...]` are implemented but untested, malformed patterns), maxLabels boundary conditions (0, exceeds available labels), string edge cases (whitespace, special characters), and the CLI entry point entirely. Some assertions are loose (using `.toContain()` vs `.toEqual()`). Would catch most regressions in core logic but gaps in edge case rigor could allow subtle bugs to slip through.
